name: Vision
text: Density Manipulation - Action: Change mass form by flipping your mass form upgrade over. (Limit once per round.)
real_text: Density Manipulation - Action: Change mass form by flipping your mass form upgrade over. (Limit once per round.)
flavor: "Odd that some say I am less than human, when in truth I am far superior."

linked_card.name: Vision
linked_card.text:
While you are in Dense mass form, you get +2 REC.

While you are in Intangible mass form, you get +1 hand size.

Setup: Put your mass form upgrade into play, Intangible side faceup.
linked_card.real_text: While you are in Dense mass form, you get +2 REC. While you are in Intangible mass form, you get +1 hand size. Setup: Put your mass form upgrade into play, Intangible side faceup.

name: Intangible
text:
Mass form. Permanent.
Vision cannot attack or defend.
Reduce the amount of damage Vision takes from each attack by 2.
real_text:
Mass form. Permanent.
Vision cannot attack or defend.
Reduce the amount of damage Vision takes from each attack by 2.
back_text: Mass form. Permanent. While in hero form, Vision gets +2 ATK and +2 DEF. Response: After you change to this mass form, draw 1 card.

name: Vivian
text:
While you are in Intangible mass form, Vivian gets +2 THW.
While you are in Dense mass form, Vivian gets +2 ATK.
real_text:
While you are in Intangible mass form, Vivian gets +2 THW.
While you are in Dense mass form, Vivian gets +2 ATK.

name: 616 Hickory Branch Lane
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust this card → search your deck and discard pile for an [[Android]] ally and add it to your hand. (Shuffle.)
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust this card → search your deck and discard pile for an [[Android]] ally and add it to your hand. (Shuffle.)
flavor: "I stand forever at the crossroads of mind and heart." —Vision

name: Solar Gem
text: Vision gains the [[Aerial]] trait. Resource: Exhaust Solar Gem → generate a [wild] resource.
real_text: Vision gains the [[Aerial]] trait. Resource: Exhaust Solar Gem → generate a [wild] resource.
flavor: The gem on Vision's brow absorbs solar energy, which his body converts into power by a process similar to photosynthesis.

name: Vision's Cape
text:
While you are in Dense mass form, you gain retaliate 1.
While you are in Intangible mass form, you gain stalwart.
real_text:
While you are in Dense mass form, you gain retaliate 1.
While you are in Intangible mass form, you gain stalwart.
flavor: Vision's density control extends to his uniform and cape.

name: Density Control
text: Hero Response: After you change mass form, discard this card → add a Vision event from your discard pile to your hand.
real_text: Hero Response: After you change mass form, discard this card → add a Vision event from your discard pile to your hand.
flavor: "Would it kill you to use the door?" —Hawkeye

name: Solar Beam
text: Hero Action (attack): If Vision is in Dense mass form, deal 7 damage to an enemy. Hero Action (thwart): If Vision is in Intangible mass form, remove 5 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): If Vision is in Dense mass form, deal 7 damage to an enemy. Hero Action (thwart): If Vision is in Intangible mass form, remove 5 threat from a scheme.

name: Superdense Strike
text: Play only if Vision is in Dense mass form. Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy. This attack gains piercing.
real_text: Play only if Vision is in Dense mass form. Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy. This attack gains piercing.
flavor: "I have made the calculations, and there is no outcome in which you win this fight." —Vision

name: Just Passing Through
text: Play only if Vision is in Intangible mass form. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme, ignoring the patrol keyword and the crisis icon ([crisis]).
real_text: Play only if Vision is in Intangible mass form. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme, ignoring the patrol keyword and the crisis icon ([crisis]).

name: Phase Disruption
text: Play only if Vision is in Intangible mass form. Hero Action: Confuse an enemy. Choose an attachment on that enemy with the text "Hero Action" or "Hero Response" and discard that attachment.
real_text: Play only if Vision is in Intangible mass form. Hero Action: Confuse an enemy. Choose an attachment on that enemy with the text "Hero Action" or "Hero Response" and discard that attachment.

name: Mass Increase
text: Play only if Vision is in Dense mass form. Hero Interrupt (defense): When Vision defends, prevent all damage from that attack. Stun the attacking enemy after that attack resolves.
real_text: Play only if Vision is in Dense mass form. Hero Interrupt (defense): When Vision defends, prevent all damage from that attack. Stun the attacking enemy after that attack resolves.

name: Jocasta
text: You may play the event attached to Jocasta as if it were in your hand. Response: After Jocasta enters play, choose a [[Defense]] event in your discard pile and attach it to her facedown.
real_text: You may play the event attached to Jocasta as if it were in your hand. Response: After Jocasta enters play, choose a [[Defense]] event in your discard pile and attach it to her facedown.

name: Protector
text: Interrupt: When Protector would take any amount of damage, spend a [mental] resource → reduce that amount by 1. (Limit once per round.)
real_text: Interrupt: When Protector would take any amount of damage, spend a [mental] resource → reduce that amount by 1. (Limit once per round.)

name: Victor Mancha
text: Reduce the amount of damage Victor Mancha takes from each attack by 1.
real_text: Reduce the amount of damage Victor Mancha takes from each attack by 1.

name: Flow Like Water
text: Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player. Response: After you play a [[Defense]] card, deal 1 damage to the attacking enemy.
real_text: Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player. Response: After you play a [[Defense]] card, deal 1 damage to the attacking enemy.

name: Indomitable
text: Response: After your hero defends, discard indomitable → ready your hero.
real_text: Response: After your hero defends, discard indomitable → ready your hero.

name: Defiance
text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When a boost card on an enemy attacking you would be turned faceup, discard it instead.
real_text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When a boost card on an enemy attacking you would be turned faceup, discard it instead.

real_text: Hero Interrupt (defense): When you would take any amount of damage, prevent 3 of that damage. If you paid for this card using [energy] resource, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

real_text: Hero Interrupt: When a treachery card is revealed from the encounter deck, cancel its "When Revealed" effects. The villain attacks you instead.

name: Preservation

real_text: Max 1 per deck. Hero Response: After you spend this card, heal 1 damage from your hero.

real_text: Interrupt: When Machine Man attacks or thwarts, spend up to 3 resources of any type → Machine Man gets +1 THW and +1 ATK for this use for each resource spent this way.

real_text: Max 1 per player. Action: Exhaust Avengers Mansion → choose a player. That player draws 1 card.

name: Ultron
text: Toughness. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Ultron attacks you, if Ultron Drones is in play, put the top card of your deck into play facedown, engaged with you as a [[Drone]] minion.
real_text: Toughness. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Ultron attacks you, if Ultron Drones is in play, put the top card of your deck into play facedown, engaged with you as a [[Drone]] minion.

name: Ultron Unleashed
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck, discard pile, and set-aside area for Ultron Drones and put it into play. Shuffle the encounter deck. Each player puts the top card of their deck into play facedown, engaged with them as a [[Drone]] minion.
real_text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck, discard pile, and set-aside area for Ultron Drones and put it into play. Shuffle the encounter deck. Each player puts the top card of their deck into play facedown, engaged with them as a [[Drone]] minion.

name: Ultron Drones
text: Each facedown [[Drone]] minion engaged with a player has a base SCH of 1, base ATK of 1, and a base hit points of 1. Forced Response: After a facedown [[Drone]] minion is defeated, place that card in its owner's discard pile.

real_text: When Revealed: If Ultron Drones is in play, put the top 2 cards of your deck into play facedown, engaged with you as [[Drone]] minions. Otherwise, discard 2 random cards from your hand.
